V2 DB

The Cactus Network is a layer 1, cryptocurrency blockchain, built on the Proof of Space and Time (PoST) consensus.

The PoST consensus uses drastically less energy than the PoW (proof-of-work) method used by blockchains such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, making Cactus environmentally friendly. At the same time, it is extremely secure due to the underlying opensource code design, as well as highly decentralized, thanks to the worldwide participation of Cactus farmers.

Join the Cactus Network community by becoming a Cactus Farmer and earning Cactus coins (CAC), or purchasing coins directly. The Cactus Blockchain supports NFT’s, Tokens, and many third party developer solutions for ease of use and practicality.

Visit our Discord page to learn more!
